summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Research Assistant Platform. All backend APIs (19/19 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. Fixed numpy.bool serialization bug in statistics endpoint.

fixed.issue: numpy.bool not JSON serializable - caused 500 error
fixed.fix: Converted numpy.bool to Python bool in anova_result['significant']

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchSessions' - minor, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ChatAssistant.jsx line 19: useEffect missing dependency - consider adding fetchSessions to dependency array or using useCallback

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, forms submit correctly)

test_credentials: No authentication required - app is open access
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for references and research data, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Dashboard stats, AI Chat (Claude Opus), Statistics Calculator (ANOVA/DMRT), Writing Editor (paraphrase/formal modes), Reference Manager (CRUD), Research Data (CRUD with visualization). Backend uses emergentintegrations library for Claude Opus 4-6 integration. AI responses take 10-20 seconds.

dashboard.details: Stats display, quick actions, research context card all working

chat_sessions.details: Create, list, delete sessions working. AI responses from Claude Opus working correctly in Bahasa Indonesia

statistics_calculator.details: ANOVA calculation, DMRT grouping, descriptive stats, chart visualization all working

writing_editor.details: Paraphrase, formal, review, suggest modes working. Templates display correctly

reference_manager.details: Create, list, search, delete references working

research_data.details: Create, list, delete data entries working. Chart visualization working

sidebar_navigation.details: All navigation links work correctly between pages

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/chat/send - Send message and get AI response
